title: Void Pearl / Ender Void
description: Changes the texture of Ender pearl and E-Chest
body:
## The Event Horizon: Void Pearl

Master the art of instantaneous displacement with the **Void Pearl**. This pack strips away the shimmering teal of the Ender Pearl, replacing it with a dense, light-consuming sphere of pure entropy.

---

### The Lore: The Singularity of n32x3d_2

As the entity **n32x3d_2** watched the dimensions collapse, he realized that standard teleportation was too "bright," leaving a trail of purple glitter for enemies to follow. He took a handful of Ender Pearls and subjected them to the absolute zero of the void.

Under the cold gaze of **n32x3d_2**, the inner energy of the pearl froze and imploded. The vibrant core collapsed into a miniature black hole. Now, when thrown, the pearl doesn't travel through space—it tears a temporary hole in it. To use a Void Pearl is to be pulled through the darkness by n32x3d_2 himself, reappearing at your destination before the sound of the impact even reaches the air.

---

### Pack Features

* **Obsidian Core:** The center of the pearl is a perfect, pitch-black void ($#000000$), surrounded by a metallic, charcoal-grey rim.
* **Monochromatic Shimmer:** The traditional magical glow has been replaced with a cold, silver-grey glint that only catches the light at specific angles.
* **Stealth Trajectory:** The dark texture makes the pearl nearly invisible against the night sky or the End’s void, allowing for surprise repositioning in combat.
* **n32x3d_2 Integration:** Fully consistent with the **[Project: Soulless](https://modrinth.com/collection/wMG6zrtF)** aesthetic, ensuring your entire hotbar remains unified in darkness.
